payload.title: [HIGH] Alias-claim impersonation of another member's actor
payload.description: claimAlias (src/auth_hosted/membership.js) only rejects an alias already mapped to another account; it never checks the alias against existing account ids / member identities. A member POSTs /api/projects/:t/aliases {alias:'acct_victim'} (or victim's local name), then pushes events with actor=acct_victim which pass authorizeUploadActors via the alias allow-set -> forged attributed history. FIX: reject claiming an alias equal to any account id / other member identity unless it resolves to the claimer (or require owner approval).
